title: Cryptocurrency and AI industries tested their influence in Illinois. It didn't go well
description: The artificial intelligence and cryptocurrency industries have suffered a setback as they try to reshape the midterm elections and establish themselves as power players in American politics.

title: NTT Global Data Centers Plans to Double Capacity in AI Boom
description: NTT Global Data Centers, the world’s third-largest data center provider outside of China, is working to double its capacity to 4 gigawatts to meet the rising global demand for the critical digital infrastructure amid an artificial intelligence boom.
content:

title: Senator Blackburn introduces the first draft of a federal AI bill
description: Sen. Marsha Blackburn (R-Tenn.) shared a discussion draft for codifying a set of national rules guiding artificial intelligence.

title: How China is getting everyone on OpenClaw, from gear heads to grandmas
description: China's ClawdBot use is soaring as tech giants hold meet-ups to help everyone add the artificial intelligence digital assistant to their devices.
content:
